calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-21-2026 Set For Trial On Oct-05-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-13-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court's tentative ruling as adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT TESSA SUGARBAKER'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is DENIED. Moving party failed to carry their burden and establish that any claims arise out of protected activity.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-24-2025 Continued To Jan-13-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

Defendant's Motion to Strike Complaint is continued to January 13, 2026 per stipulation and order.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)
